title: Crantzia sprucei
taxonomy: Crantzia sprucei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is a cactus native to Mexico. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Crantzia, which is a group of small cacti. The classification of Crantzia sprucei is further detailed in botanical classifications as Crantzia sprucei (Britton & Rose) Backeb. This classification places it within the subfamily Pereskioideae.
